qa_pairs.question: How should I cite Gurobi software for an academic publication?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find instructions on how to cite Gurobi software for an academic publication by referring to the support article available at https://support.gurobi.com/hc/en-us/articles/360013195592-How-do-I-cite-Gurobi-software-for-an-academic-publication-.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find general help resources for Gurobi software?
qa_pairs.answer: General help resources for Gurobi software include the Gurobi Help Center at https://support.gurobi.com/hc/en-us, the Gurobot AI Agent at https://portal.gurobi.com/iam/chat, and the official online Gurobi documentation at https://docs.gurobi.com/13.0/.

qa_pairs.question: How do I get help specifically for using Gurobi on Digital Research Alliance of Canada systems?
qa_pairs.answer: For help using Gurobi on the Alliance systems, you should submit a technical support ticket.
